testcase.name: verifyNoteEditFunctionality

failure.message: TC-10 FAILED: Updated description not reflected in UI. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: TC-10 FAILED: Updated description not reflected in UI. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at tests.ui.NoteEditTest.verifyNoteEditFunctionality(NoteEditTest.java:91) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)
testcase.system-out: [RETRY] Genuine failure — not retrying: verifyNoteEditFunctionality | Reason: TC-10 FAILED: Updated description not reflected in UI. expected [true] but found [false] TEST FAILED: verifyNoteEditFunctionality Screenshot attached to Allure.

testcase.name: verifySaveWithoutChangesInEditMode
testcase.system-out: [PERF] Login Page | Navigation: -1780075741730ms | DOM Ready: 2425ms ✓ OK entered password [PERF] Dashboard After Login | Navigation: 4734ms | DOM Ready: 2425ms ✓ OK [PERF] Login Page | Navigation: 4757ms | DOM Ready: 2375ms ✓ OK entered password [SELF-HEAL] Primary locator worked: By.cssSelector: [data-testid='add-new-note'] [RETRY] Flaky failure detected — retrying test: verifyNoteAppearsAfterCreation (Attempt 1 of 2) [RETRY] Ad/iframe interference detected — restarting browser for clean retry... STEP 1: Opened existing note in edit mode. STEP 2: Save button enabled without modifications = true STEP 3: Save button clicked without editing note. Expected: Save button disabled OR validation/warning message displayed. Actual: Save action executed and dashboard refreshed silently. TC-24 PASSED (Observation Logged): Application allows save without modifications. TEST PASSED: verifySaveWithoutChangesInEditMode

testcase.name: verifyUICreatedNoteAppearsInAPI
testcase.system-out: TC-14: Note created in UI TC-14 PASSED TEST PASSED: verifyUICreatedNoteAppearsInAPI

testcase.name: verifyUIAndAPIDetailsMatch
testcase.system-out: [PERF] Login Page | Navigation: 4049ms | DOM Ready: 1524ms ✓ OK entered password UI Title: TC-05 Test Note | API Title: TC-05 Test Note UI Description: Valid note for TC-05 | API Description: Valid note for TC-05 UI Category: | API Category: Home TC-15 PASSED: UI and API data match. TEST PASSED: verifyUIAndAPIDetailsMatch
testcase.system-err: May 29, 2026 11:00:02 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 May 29, 2026 11:00:02 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.179. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.21.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: verifyAPIDeletedNoteDisappearsFromUI
testcase.system-out: [PERF] Login Page | Navigation: 5454ms | DOM Ready: 1713ms ⚠ SLOW TC-18: Note created via API — ID: 6a19cd3451ccbd0297d4a77d entered password TC-18: Note deleted via API OBSERVATION BEFORE REFRESH: Deleted note still visible in UI = true TC-18 PASSED OBSERVATION: UI requires refresh to reflect API deletion. TEST PASSED: verifyAPIDeletedNoteDisappearsFromUI

testcase.name: verifyDeletedNoteCannotBeAccessed
testcase.system-out: [PERF] Login Page | Navigation: 4842ms | DOM Ready: 1642ms ✓ OK entered password TC-19 PASSED TEST PASSED: verifyDeletedNoteCannotBeAccessed
